/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-unused-result --std=c++17 CMakeFiles/patchdemo.dir/patchdemo.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/ast2xml.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/print_config.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/tree2xml.cc.o ../../lib/util/CMakeFiles/util.dir/xml2ast.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/FDMJAST.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/namemaps.cc.o ../../lib/ir/CMakeFiles/ir.dir/ast2tree.cc.o ../../lib/ir/CMakeFiles/ir.dir/tr_exp.cc.o ../../lib/ir/CMakeFiles/ir.dir/treep.cc.o ../../vendor/tinyxml2/CMakeFiles/vendor_xml.dir/tinyxml2.cc.o -o patchdemo
